name: BD Power Tools Ltd
note: Fastest & most reliable. Authorised distributor for Bosch, Makita, DeWalt. Consistent stock, warranty support.
bestChoiceReason: Authorised dealer ensures genuine parts, full warranty, and guaranteed availability for power tools.

name: Electro Mart BD
note: Good backup for electrical items. Prices slightly higher but always has Fluke in stock.
bestChoiceReason: Only authorised Fluke dealer in the region — ensures original instruments with calibration certificate.

name: Pro Hardware Dhaka
note: Best for Bahco and Knipex hand tools. Competitive pricing, good margins. Regular monthly shipments.
bestChoiceReason: Longest relationship with Bahco/Knipex import chain — lowest wholesale price on pliers and wrenches.

name: German Tools BD
note: Direct import from Germany. Best quality assurance, COO certificates available. Higher minimum order.
bestChoiceReason: Direct importer with German quality certificates — best for high-value tool sets where authenticity matters.

name: Plumb Supply BD
note: Plumbing tools specialist. Best price on Ridgid and Rothenberger. Ships from Chittagong, allow 4 days.
bestChoiceReason: Only specialist plumbing supplier with Ridgid and Rothenberger OEM stock. No counterfeit risk.

name: Khulna Build Depot
note: Fastest local delivery (1 day). BSRM authorised dealer. Ideal for heavy/bulk items like cement, rods, sheets.
bestChoiceReason: Only local supplier — saves freight cost and gets items next day. BSRM authorisation ensures grade quality.

name: Safety First BD
note: Safety & scaffolding specialist. MSA helmet certified. SGB scaffolding clamps with load certificates.
bestChoiceReason: Safety products require certifications — this supplier provides BNBC-compliant safety equipment with load test documents.

name: Local PVC Depot
note: Large local stock of PVC and HDPE pipes. Good backup for Pran pipes. Prices negotiable on bulk orders.
bestChoiceReason: Largest local HDPE pipe inventory — avoids long Dhaka freight delay for bulky pipe stock.

name: Dhaka Tool Hub
note: Wide product range, good for general hardware restocking. Stanley authorised. Fast 2-day Dhaka dispatch.
bestChoiceReason: Stanley authorised dealer with the widest range — best one-stop supplier for general hardware needs.
